title: sida decandra
intro: Sida decandra, also known as Country Mallow, is a plant species native to tropical Africa and parts of Asia, belonging to the Malvaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Sida decandra include the treatment of fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an anti-venom for snake bites. Sida decandra is traditionally prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of decoctions, infusions, and pastes, which are used to treat various ailments.
